[01:01.52] He won't quit, he's addicted to work

[01:05.25] Working, working, what can you do?
[01:06.91] See the life from a different point of view
[01:08.91] Waiting in the morning for the bell to chime
[01:10.64] I think he's glad it's working time
[01:27.30] The workaholic
[01:29.39] 
[01:42.44] Work your body baby, work your soul
[01:46.12] Keep on workin', workin' to the bone
[01:49.87] Work your body baby, work your soul
[01:53.11] I'm a workaholic when I'm on the floor
[01:58.65]
